# Debug Log Template

## Symptom
- What breaks
- Expected behavior
- Scope and impact

## Reproduction
- Entry point
- Exact steps
- Environment or branch assumptions

## Hypotheses
- Hypothesis 1
- Hypothesis 2
- Hypothesis 3

## Evidence
- Logs, traces, or code paths checked
- What each check ruled in or out

## Likely root cause
- Concise statement of the failure mechanism

## Next step
- Safe fix direction or the next diagnostic step
